name: hecateflow
description: Reusable, MCU-agnostic embedded-development skill system (13 skills): interactive workspace/target init, incremental design & implementation, behavior-preserving refactor, deep review, and an always-on per-edit safety gate. v1.2 adds autonomy-first multi-model orchestration: self-verification first, proactive read-only subagents, review chains, write workers gated on the user explicitly asked to implement/modify/land/apply a patch (用户已明确要求实现/修改/落地/应用补丁), a determined plan, disjoint file scopes, and explicit worker boundaries; minimal questions limited to external unverifiable facts, safety boundaries, hardware/physical risk, write-worker scope escalation risk, and Git/remote history changes; and user-confirmed Git after summary/tests/suggested commit message/files-to-stage for the current change set. Distilled from a real multi-core bare-metal C project.
